title: Snowglobe Workflow
description: The contract between the dashboard workflow builder and the automation engine. {{event.*}} placeholders in step config strings are resolved against the triggering event; {{steps.<id>.<field>}} resolves against earlier steps' output in the same run (e.g. {{steps.s1.answer}} = the agent's report from step s1).

event_type.description: Semantic event type slug to match (snake_case), or '*' to match any event type. Open-ended; not a fixed enum.

zone.description: Optional; omit to match any zone

cooldown_sec.description: Dedup window: max one run per (workflow, zone) per window

config.description: Per-type config. h_agent: {task: google_form|ticket|custom_url, url, instructions}. composio: {action: drive_upload|sheets_append|slack_message, ...params}. condition: {expression}. voice: {text}. mcp: {server_url, tool, arguments} — call any tool on any MCP server (Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, …).
